preamble: The transformation of [a] into the nasalized mid-front vowel [ẽ] involves nasalization followed by vowel raising, characteristic of many Romance developments.

examples.note: Historical development of nasalized open vowels into more closed nasal counterparts.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
